completed_steps.summary: Classified as monorepo with 4 parts (mobile/web/tooling/shared) — pnpm + Turborepo + uv workspace
Existing docs inventoried: root README, per-app READMEs, apps/web AGENTS.md, apps/tooling docs/* (6 files), full _bmad-output/legacy/ planning surface (88+ files)
Tech stack analyzed per part — Expo54/RN0.81 (mobile), Next 16.2/React 19.2 (web), Python 3.11+/OpenCV (tooling), TS+Zod+JSON Schema (shared)

Deep scan: read 30+ critical files across all 4 parts including processingPipeline, detectionConfigService, all 7 web API routes, stripe webhook handlers, contracts schemas, tooling launcher + map_config_generator, all package.jsons + tsconfigs + eslint-config
development-guide.md + deployment-guide.md written (deployment honest about missing CI/CD)
integration-architecture.md written — 13 integration edges enumerated, full Stripe webhook + auth + detection-config flows
Architecture docs written for all 4 parts
Supporting docs: project-overview, data-models-{mobile,web,shared}, api-contracts-web, component-inventory-{mobile,web}, project-parts.json
Validation: 17 docs written, no incomplete markers, all cross-references resolve

technology_stack.mobile: Expo SDK 54 / React Native 0.81 / React 19.1 / Firebase 12 / Zustand 5 / NativeWind 4 / FFmpeg-kit 6.1 / expo-sqlite 16 / MMKV v3
technology_stack.web: Next.js 16.2.2 / React 19.2 / Tailwind 4 / shadcn/ui 4 / Firebase 12 client + admin 13 / Stripe 22 / Zod 4 / Vitest
technology_stack.tooling: Python ≥3.11 / OpenCV 4 / NumPy 1 / imagehash / PyYAML / questionary / pytest 8
technology_stack.shared: TypeScript 5 / Zod 3 / json-schema-to-zod / ESLint flat config

resume_instructions: Workflow complete. To re-scan: archive this file and re-run bmad-document-project.
